name: Skillet Pork Chops with Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large plastic bag, combine flour, 5 tablespoons Parmesan cheese, salt, dill weed, and pepper. Place pork chops in the bag and shake to coat. Shake off excess.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Brown pork chops on both sides.
3. Reduce heat to medium. Add onion slices to the skillet.
4. Add water and cover. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Place zucchini slices over the onions.
6. Mix remaining Parmesan cheese with the reserved flour mixture. Sprinkle over zucchini.
7. Sprinkle paprika on top.
8. Cover and simmer for an additional 25 minutes, or until pork chops are tender.
Yield: 6 Servings
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving equals 3 meat, 1-1/2 vegetable; also, 279 calories, 638 mg sodium, 78 mg cholesterol, 9 gm carbohydrate, 27 gm protein, 15 gm fat.
